verses.text: Benjamin-te sung panin Afiah' tapa Bekorath, a tapa Zeror, a tapa Abiel, a tapa Kish min nei, Benjamin-te mihau khat a om hi
Amah in tangval a melhoih, a min Saul ahi tapa khat nei hi. Israel mite lakah amah sangin a melhoihzaw, a thacingzaw khat zong omlo a, midang khempeuh ama liangko ciang bek pha uh hi
Tua laitakin Saul' pa Kish' late a mang hi. Tua ahih ciangin Kish in a tapa Saul kiangah, “Nasemte khat sam in la, late va zong in,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Efraim mualtung gamteng leh Shalisha gam teng nawkin zong uh a, ahih hangin mulo uh hi. Tua ciangin amaute in Shaalim gamteng zong uh a, ahih hangin tua gamah na om tuanlo hi. Tua ciangin amaute in Benjamin gamteng zong uh a, ahih hangin mu samlo uh hi
Zuf gam a tun' uh ciangin Saul in amah tawh a om a nasempa kiangah, “Hong pai in, ciahkik ni. Tua hi kei leh ka pa in late ngaihsun nawnloin eite hong lunghimawh zaw khading hi,” a ci hi

Ahih hangin a nasempa in, “En in, hih khuapi sungah Pasian' mi khat om a, a kizahtak mi khat ahi hi. Ama gen khempeuh a manin tung hi. Tua lai-ah pai ni. Eite' khualzin khiatna thu amah in hong genthei khading hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Saul in a nasempa kiangah, “Ahih hangin pai lehang, tua mipa bang puak ding ihi hiam? I van sunga i anlum beita a, Pasian' mipa kiangah i puak ding letsong omlo hi. Bang nei nawn ihi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin a nasempa in Saul dawngkikin, “Hih lai-ah ngun sumnen tang khat ka nei hi. I vai hong genna dingin Pasian' mipa kiangah ka pia ding hi,” a ci hi

(Tua ma lai-in Israel-te sungah mi khat in Pasian kiangah thudong dingin a pai ciangin amah in, “Hong pai in, thumupa kiangah va pai ni,” ci hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh tuhuna kamsang i cihte tua ma-in thumupa kici hi
Tua ciangin Saul in a nasempa kiangah, “Tua ahih leh hoih hi, va pai ni,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Pasian' mipa a omna khuapi-ah amaute a pai uh hi
Amaute khuapi omna muatungah a paitoh laitakun khuapi panin tui tawi dingin hong paikhia nungaknote tawh kituak uh ahih manin amaute kiangah, “Thumupa hih lai-ah a om hiam?” a ci uh hi
Amaute in, “Amah om hi; note' mai diakah pai hi. Kinawh un; khuapi sungah tu mahmahin hong pai hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh mite in tuni-in mualtunga biakna-ah biakna pia uh hi

Khuapi sung na lut phetun mualtunga biakna-ah anne dingin a pai ma-in amah na mu ding uh hi. Amah in biakpiakna thupha pia ding ahih manin ama pai mateng mite in an nelo ding uh hi. Thupha a piak khit ciangin a kisam mite in ne thei pan uh hi. Tu-in paito un; bang hang hiam cih leh amah na tuakpah ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ahih ciangin khuapi-ah amaute paito uh hi. Khuapi sungah amaute a lut laitakun mualtunga biakna lamah Samuel a pai dingin amau' lamah hong paikhia a mu uh hi
Tu-in Saul hong pai ni a zan ni-in Samuel tungah Topa in thu na gen khin hi

“Zing ciang tubang hunin Benjamin gamsung panin nang kiangah mi khat kong sawl ding a, nangmah in ka mi Israel-te tungah ulian dingin amah sathau na nilh ding hi. Amah in Filistia mite' khutsung panin ka mite honkhia ding hi; bang hang hiam cih leh amaute' kikona kei kiang hong tung khin ahih manin ka mite' gimna ka mu khinzo hi,” a ci hi
Samuel in Saul a muh ciangin Topa in ama kiangah, “Nang kiangah kong gen mipa hih lai-ah hong paita hi. Amah pen ka mite' tungah a uk dingpa ahi hi,” ci-in a gen hi
Tua ciangin Saul in kulhkongpi-ah Samuel va naihin, “Hong gen in; thumupa' inn koilai ahi hiam?” a ci hi

Samuel in Saul dawngin, “Keimah, thumupa ka hi hi; mualtunga biakna-ah keima mai-ah na paito in; bang hang hiam cih leh nangmah in tuni-in kei tawh an na ne ding a, zingsang ciangin nang hong ciahsakin na lungsima om khempeuh nang kiangah kong gen ding hi

Tuma ni thum lai-in a mang na late ahih leh, kimu khinta ahih manin tuate na lungsimah ngaihsun nawn kei in. Israel-te' deihdeihte kua' tungah om ahi hiam? Nang leh na pa' innkuante khempeuh tungah a om hilo ahi hiam?” a ci hi

Saul in dawngin, “Kei pen Israel minamte sung panin a tawmpen Benjamin-te hilo ka hi hiam? Keima innkuan, Benjamin minam innkuan khempeuh sung panin a niampen hilo ahi hiam? Tua ahih ciangin bang hangin hih bangin kei tungah hong pau na hi hiam?” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Samuel in Saul leh a nasempa samin inndei sungah paipih a, mihing sawmthum bang a pha a kisam mite lak tutna bul lamah a tusak hi
Tua ciangin Samuel in anhuanpa kiangah, “Nang kiangah kong piak, ‘Na tuam koih in,’ kong cih pawl hong paipih in,” a ci hi

Tua ahih ciangin anhuanpa in a khe leh a kawngsa la-in Saul' mai-ah a lui hi. Tua ciangin Samuel in, “Thei in, a kisit pen nang' mai-ah hong kilui hi. Ne in; bang hang hiam cih leh leenglate tawh na nektheihna dingin a kiseh hun a cin' mateng nang-a' dingin hong kisitsak ahi hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin tua ni-in Saul in Samuel tawh an ne khawm hi
Amaute mualtunga biakna panin khuapi sungah a paisuk uh ciangin innkhumzangah Saul-a' dingin lupna khat na kiphah a, a ihmu dingin amah lumsuk hi
Khua a vak ciangin Samuel in innkhumzanga Saul samin, “Na paina dingah kong sawl theihna dingin tho in,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Saul tho-in, amah leh Samuel, khuapi kongzingah a pai uh hi

Amaute khuapi nawlah a paikawmun Samuel in Saul kiangah, “I mai-ah na nasempa a paisuakna ding gen in la, amah a paisuak khit ciangin nang' tungah Pasian' thute kong theihsak theihna dingin tawlkhat hih lai-ah khawl in,” a ci hi.
